problem_solved: High cost and failure rate of early-stage drug discovery and hit identification
solution_description: AI-powered structure-based drug design using deep learning for molecular screening. AtomNet technology screens billions of compounds for drug target binding. Platform partnerships with pharma.
notes: Early AI drug discovery company focused on structure-based design. AtomNet uses 3D molecular structures. Competes with Insilico, BenevolentAI.
